name: Monte Carlo
description: Monitor Monte Carlo data observability platform for pipeline reliability and data quality compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Monte Carlo at https://getmontecarlo.com
2. Go to Settings → API
3. Click Create Key
4. Copy the Key ID and Token
5. Enter both below

credentialFields.label: API Key ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Monte Carlo Settings → API → Create Key

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Monte Carlo Settings → API → Create Key

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies Monte Carlo is monitoring data pipelines for quality issues

checks.name: Employee Access
